pageDescription: Bhargesh Patel — software engineer at Bridginex, Surat. End-to-end web apps in Angular, React, Node, and Supabase. Open to contract work.
heroBio: Five years shipping web products for clients. I own features from the interface through to the data — not just the UI handoff.
contactBody: Open to contract and freelance projects. Based in Surat, happy to work remote. Email is the fastest way to reach me.
manifesto: I'm a software engineer who builds complete web products — the interface, the API, and the data model underneath. You get one person who can take a feature from a rough idea to something running in production.

Over five years I've moved from frontend work on enterprise Angular apps to full-stack delivery at Bridginex, shipping client web apps and SaaS features with Angular, React, Node, Supabase, and PostgreSQL.
I keep it direct: clear communication, honest scope, and no dropped handoffs. Based in Surat and available for contract and freelance work, anywhere remote.
